excerpt: As of 2026-05-01, the industrial sector shows strong performance, while technology and healthcare sectors are also leading. Sector weightings vary by market, with technology dominating in the U.S. and healthcare in China. Current year-to-date performance highlights sector-specific trends.

content.introduction: As of 2026-05-01, the industrial sector shows strong performance, while technology and healthcare sectors are also leading. Sector weightings vary by market, with technology dominating in the U.S. and healthcare in China. Current year-to-date performance highlights sector-specific trends.
